data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 1,800 USDT with a 4.00% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 03, 2025, 10:39 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 1,800 USDT and is now trading at 1,799.98999 USDT, with a narrowed 4.00% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ave.ai announces the launch of “Signal Square”, with the first signal earning 209 times the profit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain aggregation trading platform Ave.ai announced the launch of the multi-chain "Signal Square". This function is based on Ave's exclusive "smart money + whale + KOL" address library, multi-chain and multi-address changes, and automatically captures potential golden dog signals on the chain. 
Data shows that Ave.ai's "Signal Square" captured a token signal for the first time after it went online. The three smart money addresses were captured within 5 minutes of synchronous position building signals. So far, the token has risen more than 209 times from the moment of signal capture. 
At present, this function has been launched on the Ave.ai PC terminal, and the mobile Android version is in grayscale testing.

data.title: JPMorgan: Bitcoin’s ‘digital gold’ narrative under pressure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - JPMorgan analysts said that Bitcoin's positioning as "digital gold" is under pressure, while demand for gold continues to be strong. "Bitcoin's volatility and correlation with stocks have raised questions about its claim of being 'digital gold'." "Looking ahead, we believe that gold will continue to rise and become the main beneficiary of depreciation trades." Depreciation trades are a strategy that focuses on buying assets such as gold and Bitcoin to hedge against inflation, long-term debt and the depreciation of fiat currencies. Analysts said that the sharp rise in gold prices to more than $3,100 an ounce this year reflects the "intensification" of depreciation trades-meaning that investors are increasingly favoring gold rather than Bitcoin. (The Block)

data.title: XRP retail adoption surges 490% while Bitcoin sees modest growth
data.description:
3-4-2025 – Glassnode’s latest insights, as reported by BlockBeats, reveal a striking divergence in the cryptocurrency landscape. XRP has emerged as a darling of retail investors in this cycle, with a remarkable 490% leap in active addresses since the market trough of 2022. Meanwhile, Bitcoin, often seen as the institutional heavyweight, has recorded a modest [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/xrp-retail-adoption-surges-490-while-bitcoin-sees-modest-growth/

data.title: Sui Launched Splash™: The First Waterpark Experience
data.description:
Sui is taking blockchain beyond finance and into entertainment with Sui Splash™. At Sui Waterpark, visitors access facilities with digital passes. These passes allow them to access their crypto wallets integrated into their wristbands. Read on for the details
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/sui-launched-splash-the-first-waterpark-experience/

data.title: Pi Coin Price Crashes 78%: Is This the End for the Once-Hyped Cryptocurrency?
data.description:
After launching its mainnet in February with high hopes, the price skyrocketed to $2. 98, making it briefly one of the top ten cryptocurrencies. But fast forward to April, and things have taken a complete U-turn
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/pi-coin-price-crashes-78-is-this-the-end-for-the-once-hyped-cryptocurrency/

data.title: EU to Vote on Countermeasures Against U.S. Steel and Aluminum Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, senior officials from the European Union have announced that EU member states are scheduled to vote on April 9 regarding countermeasures against the United States' tariffs on steel and aluminum. The decision comes in response to the tariffs imposed by the U.S., which have been a point of contention between the two economic powers. The vote will determine the EU's course of action in addressing these trade issues.

data.title: Babylon announces token economics: total 10 billion tokens, community incentives account for 15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Babylon announced the economics of BABY tokens, with a total of 10 billion, including: community incentives (15%), ecological construction (18%), R&D and operations (18%), early private investors (30.5%), team (15%), and consultants (3.5%).

data.title: Babylon airdrop query page is now online
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Babylon airdrop query page is now online. Babylon will airdrop 600 million BABY to early adopters, accounting for 6% of the total supply. Eligible users include: Phase 1/Phase 2 stakers, Pioneer Pass NFT holders, and GitHub contributors.

data.title: Justin Sun: Met with Hong Kong Legislative Council member Wu Jiezhuang and submitted relevant materials of FDT case to regulatory and judicial authorities
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen posted on the X platform: "I met with Hong Kong Legislative Council member Wu Jiezhuang and reported the misappropriation of nearly US$500 million of customer reserve funds by First Digital Trust (FDT), and submitted relevant materials to regulatory agencies and judicial authorities. We are fully confident that we will recover the funds and hold those who stole the funds accountable."
